children.text: My father, Yang Liwei, is a taikonaut, and he is very famous.
children.cn: 我的父亲杨利伟是一名宇航员，他非常有名。
children.notes: taikonaut 是中国宇航员的专有名词。
children.statement: Yang Liwei 是一个非常有名的宇航员。

children.text: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
children.cn: 2003年10月，我的父亲乘坐神舟五号飞入太空。
children.notes: flew 是 fly 的过去式。
children.statement: 杨利伟在2003年飞入了太空。

children.text: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
children.cn: 他在太空度过了大约二十一个小时。
children.notes: spent 是 spend 的过去式；about 表示“大约”。
children.statement: 他在太空待了刚好21个小时。
children.explanation: 文中用的是 'about' (大约)，不是刚好。

children.text: He did a lot of work there.
children.cn: 他在那里做了很多工作。
children.notes: did 是 do 的过去式；there 指代 space。
children.statement: 他在太空只是休息，没有工作。
children.explanation: 文中说 'He did a lot of work'。

children.text: He also made a video in space.
children.cn: 他还在太空制作了一段视频。
children.notes: made 是 make 的过去式。
children.explanation: 文中说 'He also made a video'。

children.text: Then he came back to the earth.
children.notes: came back 表示“回来”；earth 要加 the。
children.explanation: 文中说 'came back to the earth'。

children.text: My mother and I went to the airport to meet my father.
children.cn: 我妈妈和我去机场迎接我父亲。
children.notes: went 是 go 的过去式；meet 在这里是“迎接”。
children.statement: 全家人去机场接杨利伟。
children.explanation: 文中提到 'My mother and I went to the airport'。

children.notes: were 是 are 的过去式。
children.statement: 接到父亲后他们很难过。

children.notes: great 表示“伟大的，极好的”。
children.statement: 作者认为这一天非常普通。
children.explanation: 文中说 'It was a great day'。

children.text: I was very proud of him.
children.notes: be proud of 为...感到自豪。
children.statement: 作者为自己的父亲感到骄傲。
children.explanation: 文中说 'I was very proud of him'。

children.text: Now he still tells me about his space travel.
children.cn: 现在他仍然告诉我关于他的太空旅行。
children.notes: still 表示“仍然”；space travel 太空旅行。
children.statement: 杨利伟现在不再谈论太空的事了。
children.explanation: 文中说 'he still tells me' (他仍然告诉我)。

children.text: I want to go into space someday too.
children.cn: 我也想有朝一日进入太空。
children.explanation: 文中说 'I want to go into space someday too'。
